features.title: List & search notes by text, label, colour, or state (pinned/archived/trashed)
Create text notes and checklist notes
Manage list items — add, check/uncheck, or replace all items
Full label support — list, create, delete, assign, and remove labels
Colour filters — find all your red, blue, or yellow notes
Credentials in macOS Keychain — nothing written to disk
Destructive actions require explicit confirm: true
11 tools total — covering the full gkeepapi surface
